title: Kalaivaaniyo Raniyo Lyrics Villu Paattukaran
stanzas:
Kalaivaaniyo raniyo
aval thaan yaaro
Silai meniyo deviyo
edhu thaan pero (2)

Ava melazhagum
thanda kaalazhagum
Dhenam paarthirunthaa
villuppaattu varum

Kalaivaaniyo raniyo
aval thaan yaaro
Silai meniyo deviyo
edhu thaan pero (2)

Paadhanthodum poongolusu
thaana thanthom paada
Vedhangalum naadhangalum
vendi vanthadhu kooda

Paadhangala paarthathume
paarva valliye mele
Vedhanaigalai maathidum
ava virinja shenbaga chola

Poothathaiya poovu
adhu kaiyazhagu
Thookkuthaiya vaasam
adhu mei azhagu

Naan vanthen vaazhthi paada
Nallathai sonnen raagathoda

Kanden seethai pola
Kandathum ninnen
silaiyaip pola
Indhira logam chandhira logam
sundhara logam pottra

Kalaivaaniyo raniyo
aval thaan yaaro
Silai meniyo deviyo
edhu thaan pero (2)

Kodai mazhai kondu varum
koondhal engira megam
Jaadaiyila yethi vidum
thaagam engira mogam

Kodiyila oruthiyamma
kolamayil raani
Aadi varum poongalasam
azhagirukkum meni

Ther nadanthu theruvil
varum oorvalama.
Oor ulagil avala
pola paer varuma.

Nalla palingu pola sirippu
Manasa parikkum
pavala virippu
Vilangidaatha inippu
Vivaram purinjidaatha thudippu

Chandhira jothi vanthathu pola
Sundhara devi jolippu

Kalaivaaniyo raniyo
aval thaan yaaro
Silai meniyo deviyo

edhu thaan pero (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kalaivaaniyo Raniyo?

The song revolves around themes of beauty and admiration, capturing a romantic and soothing vibe.

Who composed the music for Villu Paattukaran?

The music for the movie was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

Who is the singer of Kalaivaaniyo Raniyo?

The song is sung by the renowned playback singer S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

When was the movie Villu Paattukaran released?

The movie was released on November 27, 1992.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kalaivaaniyo Raniyo from Villu Paattukaran is a beautiful melody that evokes feelings of romance and admiration. The lyrics poetically describe the beauty and grace of a beloved, creating a soothing and nostalgic atmosphere. Composed by Ilaiyaraaja and sung by S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, the song is a classic example of Tamil cinema's rich musical heritage. It perfectly complements moments of love and reflection, making it a timeless favorite.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the timeless charm of Kalaivaaniyo Raniyo from the movie Villu Paattukaran. This classic melody, composed by Ilaiyaraaja and sung by S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. Dive into the soothing tunes and let the music transport you to a world of elegance and grace.
